extraction.one_line_summary: MOSCON Gianni attacked from bottom of final climb to Munluo, soloed to victory taking overall race lead from sprinter JAKOBSEN
tactical_patterns: Trek-Segafredo and EF paced entire stage to position climbers perfectly at base, preventing late breakaway success.
Moscon attacked immediately at climb base before selection occurred, exploiting peloton hesitation during positional chaos.
Sky isolated Moscon alone rather than deploying domestiques, gambling single strong rider better than team control.

rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: positive: soloed 1.75km climb after attacking from bottom, suggesting post-Worlds form peak despite admitting season fatigue
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: negative: marked as EF's protected climber but crossed KOM behind Moscon, suggesting diminished climbing legs late-season
rider_signals.GROSSSCHARTNER Felix: positive: second place suggests unexpected climbing form for rider not typically featured as GC threat
rider_signals.KUNG Stefan: neutral: animated breakaway but role appears purely as stage animation, dropped before decisive climbing began
